ab: margi musa, aciku nolengarasu?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: nolengé am kɨkɨ ngesa na kopu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: margi musu, aciku nolengarasu?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ ngesa na turupungu.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ na kopu, iké olengé mumu?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: iké, nungu pia su longé?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: iké olengalengé mumu na thɨvéké?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: tédra, yélanglangé kname na thɨvéke.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ pgé.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: nung piyia su na thubungu longé?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: borang kwa pkaturu na thubungu.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ na burathi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: burathi ka olengénga dria ngicuru.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ ngidusa na cukini sɨsɨ.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: sesanga nema na kiara cukini.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: pusopalang kwa longé burucucu.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: nungpiasu longé na tingitingi?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: nungpiasu longé na burucucu tingitingi?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ ngidusa na tingitingi.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: nolengé ma kɨkɨ ngidusana ebeke tngareva.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: kené ka turu na ebeke na kiara. pkaculu makɨ swa bwi.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: kené écubo na pgé ka pidra pésu.
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: sesa na cubo ka drusa na edé.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: paperesenga ka mupole kesasane pésu, mposle ka maragi.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: takeedrengésu.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: kené ka mvangte klrima na pésu.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: kolengéla ngitikici, pua pkesana ɨdé.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: ngiculu nga ka lrima na edé lakmangsale na pésu.
en: A:All $510.

ab: pkalrima kwa na edé ni?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: kené ka sakura makecengé, dueu ma tmere ngitiki ci?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: eni, kené ka sakura na timerenga.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: nora ma kɨkɨ kené cubo na pingkang.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: kené pingkang ka mtuku na pésu, ikéla norasu druma na makainunga?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
